items.markdown:
Himalayan salt scrubs are `natural exfoliants that use mineral-rich salt crystals to remove dead skin cells and promote a healthy glow` . These scrubs typically combine pink salt with nourishing carrier oils and essential oils to simultaneously detoxify, moisturize, and soften the skin.[[1]](https://www.purebodynaturals.com/bath-and-body/salt-scrubs/himalayan-salt-scrub#:~:text=Usage&text=Start%20with%20wet%20skin%20in,Rinse%20with%20warm%20water.)[[2]](https://www.midwestseasaltcompany.com/blog/unveiling-the-magic-the-incredible-benefits-of-salt-scrubs-for-your-skin/)[[3]](https://www.maulirituals.com/blogs/news/how-to-use-himalayan-salts#:~:text=Whilst%20you%20are%20soaking%20in,Contact%20Us)

Key Benefits

- **Deep Exfoliation** : The abrasive texture of salt crystals effectively sloughs away dull, dry skin, encouraging the growth of healthy new cells.
- **Mineral Infusion** : Pink Himalayan salt contains over 84 trace minerals, including magnesium and calcium, which nourish the skin.
- **Improved Circulation** : Massaging the scrub in circular motions stimulates blood flow, contributing to a natural skin radiance.
- **Detoxification** : The salt's natural properties help draw out toxins and impurities from pores.
- **Moisture Retention** : By removing the dead skin layer, scrubs allow moisturizers to penetrate more deeply and effectively.[[1]](https://adelightsomelife.com/make-pink-himalayan-salt-scrub/#:~:text=Scrub%20-%20Sweet%20Orange-,Ingredients,scrub%20into%20wide%20mouth%20jars.)[[2]](https://www.midwestseasaltcompany.com/blog/unveiling-the-magic-the-incredible-benefits-of-salt-scrubs-for-your-skin/)[[3]](https://www.purebodynaturals.com/bath-and-body/salt-scrubs/himalayan-salt-scrub#:~:text=Usage&text=Start%20with%20wet%20skin%20in,Rinse%20with%20warm%20water.)[[4]](https://www.induaromatherapy.com/post/the-surprising-benefits-of-pink-himalayan-salt-scrub-best-bald-head-moisturizer-and-beyond#:~:text=With%20regular%20use%2C%20the%20scrub,help%20you%20feel%20more%20confident.)[[5]](https://miniluxe.com/products/himalayan-salt-scrub#:~:text=Apply%20a%20generous%20scoop%20onto,a%20deeper%20sense%20of%20calm.)[[6]](https://www.maulirituals.com/blogs/news/how-to-use-himalayan-salts#:~:text=Whilst%20you%20are%20soaking%20in,Contact%20Us)

Recommended Products

- Reviewers on Target frequently praise its pleasant, refreshing scent and its ability to leave skin feeling soft and moisturized.

with%20the%20Dove,deeply%20nourishing%20for%20a%20soft%2C%20radiant%20glow.)

DIY Himalayan Salt Scrub Recipe

You can easily make a basic scrub at home using the following ratios:[[1]](https://www.skincare.com/body-care/hands/homemade-hand-scrub#:~:text=INGREDIENTS:,hand%20cream%20after%20you%20scrub!)[[2]](https://www.thehealthymaven.com/how-to-make-a-salt-scrub-recipe/#:~:text=Author:%20Davida%20Lederle,a%20week%20for%20best%20results)[[3]](https://www.thehealthymaven.com/how-to-make-a-salt-scrub-recipe/#:~:text=There%20are%20a%20lot%20of%20ways%20to,right%20you'll%20be%20totally%20good%20to%20go:)

- **Salt Base** : 1 cup of fine-grind pink Himalayan salt.
- **Carrier Oil** : ¼ to ½ cup of coconut, sweet almond, or jojoba oil.
- **Fragrance** : 10–20 drops of your preferred essential oil (e.g., lavender for relaxation or citrus for energy).
- **Instructions** : Mix the salt and oils in a glass bowl until they reach the consistency of wet sand. Store in an airtight glass jar.[[1]](https://adelightsomelife.com/make-pink-himalayan-salt-scrub/#:~:text=Scrub%20-%20Sweet%20Orange-,Ingredients,scrub%20into%20wide%20mouth%20jars.)[[2]](https://mamainstincts.com/diy-pink-himalayan-salt-scrub/)[[3]](https://adelightsomelife.com/make-pink-himalayan-salt-scrub/#:~:text=Scrub%20-%20Sweet%20Orange-,Ingredients,scrub%20into%20wide%20mouth%20jars.)[[4]](https://www.thehealthymaven.com/how-to-make-a-salt-scrub-recipe/#:~:text=Author:%20Davida%20Lederle,a%20week%20for%20best%20results)[[5]](https://wildlyorganic.com/blogs/recipes/himalayan-pink-salt-scrub-a-spa-treatment-at-home#:~:text=Method%201%20%E2%80%94%20Oil-Based%20Himalayan,geranium%2C%20grapefruit%2C%20or%20lavender%29)

How to Use

1. **Dampen Skin** : Use in the shower or after a warm bath to soften the skin first.
2. **Massage Gently** : Apply a small amount and rub in circular motions, focusing on rough areas like elbows and knees.
3. **Rinse & Dry** : Rinse thoroughly with warm water and pat dry. Follow with a moisturizer to lock in hydration.
4. **Caution** : Avoid using on broken, sunburned, or freshly shaved skin as the salt can sting.[[1]](https://saltmb.com/blog/the-benefits-of-himalayan-salt-scrubs-nature-s-exfoliant#:~:text=How%20to%20Use%20Himalayan%20Salt,moisturizer%20to%20lock%20in%20hydration.)[[2]](https://www.purebodynaturals.com/bath-and-body/salt-scrubs/himalayan-salt-scrub#:~:text=Usage&text=Start%20with%20wet%20skin%20in,Rinse%20with%20warm%20water.)[[3]](https://wildlyorganic.com/blogs/recipes/himalayan-pink-salt-scrub-a-spa-treatment-at-home#:~:text=Apply%20a%20small%20amount%20of,a%20fraction%20of%20the%20cost.)[[4]](https://www.maulirituals.com/blogs/news/how-to-use-himalayan-salts#:~:text=Whilst%20you%20are%20soaking%20in,Contact%20Us)[[5]](https://lifeandpursuits.com/blogs/lap/why-a-himalayan-pink-salt-scrub-needs-to-be-in-your-beauty-routine#:~:text=Add%20three%20tablespoons%20of%20Himalayan,suitable%20component%20could%20do%20wonders.)

Are you looking for a scrub specifically for **sensitive skin** , or would you like to explore **other scents** like lavender or eucalyptus?

2. **Massage Gently** : Apply a small amount and rub in circular motions, focusing on rough areas like elbows and knees.
3. **Rinse & Dry** : Rinse thoroughly with warm water and pat dry. Follow with a moisturizer to lock in hydration.
4. **Caution** : Avoid using on broken, sunburned, or freshly shaved skin as the salt can sting.[[1]](https://saltmb.com/blog/the-benefits-of-himalayan-salt-scrubs-nature-s-exfoliant#:~:text=How%20to%20Use%20Himalayan%20Salt,moisturizer%20to%20lock%20in%20hydration.)[[2]](https://www.purebodynaturals.com/bath-and-body/salt-scrubs/himalayan-salt-scrub#:~:text=Usage&text=Start%20with%20wet%20skin%20in,Rinse%20with%20warm%20water.)[[3]](https://wildlyorganic.com/blogs/recipes/himalayan-pink-salt-scrub-a-spa-treatment-at-home#:~:text=Apply%20a%20small%20amount%20of,a%20fraction%20of%20the%20cost.)[[4]](https://www.maulirituals.com/blogs/news/how-to-use-himalayan-salts#:~:text=Whilst%20you%20are%20soaking%20in,Contact%20Us)[[5]](https://lifeandpursuits.com/blogs/lap/why-a-himalayan-pink-salt-scrub-needs-to-be-in-your-beauty-routine#:~:text=Add%20three%20tablespoons%20of%20Himalayan,suitable%20component%20could%20do%20wonders.)
